description: A formal essential, a belt is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. belmonte perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Wear this piece with formal shirts, formal shoes and crisp formal shirts.Length: 85 cmMade of genuine leather for durabilityTang clasp for a snug FitHoles to customise fitFixed loop near the buckle to hold belt in placeBranding embossed on the tail end for style CareWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in sunlight
